summary: Studio squad healthy. Two workspace PRs merged this cycle (#108 demo critical path update, #109 stale repo ref fix). studio-sr completed #101 (security bug verification) — all 3 Phase 1 bugs confirmed fixed with regression script. Reassigned studio-sr to #100 (stranger test dry-run prep). Kernel PR #1002 (--no-verify bypass invariant) merged — strengthens enforcement story for May 6 talk. Cloud PR #414 filed to fix P0 events API filter (cloud#410) but has CI failures. Product agent filed #106 (dashboard deployment gate, April 7 deadline) and #107 (enforcement story curation, April 22 deadline). Swarm healthy. No governance issues.
